title: Reliquified Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks
description: Compatibility addon between Relics and Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks
body:
Reliquified [**Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/irons-spells-n-spellbooks) is an addon that bridges the [**Relics**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/relics-mod) and [**Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/irons-spells-n-spellbooks) mods, introducing a variety of unique relics into the game. Each of these relics harnesses different [**Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/irons-spells-n-spellbooks) mechanics, unlocking their full potential and enhancing the gameplay experience.

At the moment, the addon adds 9 relics from the Blood Magic school. In the future, there are plans to add one relic for each existing spell in every existing school of magic.
